description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a combination of brick and white plastered walls, topped by a large, multi-faceted metal roof. The front facade includes a covered porch area with striped awnings and a series of wooden crates stacked in front, suggesting a utilitarian or semi-commercial use. Windows are irregularly placed, with some featuring shutters and others left open, contributing to an asymmetrical appearance. A wooden ladder and additional crates are visible at the side, indicating access to the upper level or roof. The roof is corrugated metal, weathered and slightly uneven, providing a rustic, industrial feel. The house is elevated on stilts at one end, possibly to accommodate uneven terrain or for ventilation.
description: A two-story house with brick and white plaster walls, a large corrugated metal roof, and a covered porch with striped awnings and stacked crates. The structure features asymmetrical windows, a wooden ladder, and is partially elevated on stilts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with striped awnings, stacked crates, and a human figure for scale.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden ladder, additional crates, and the transition from brick to white plaster walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying mostly brick and white plaster walls with irregularly placed windows and a crate to the left.
description_view_3: Back view showing the stilted section, more windows, and the absence of the porch and awnings seen in the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with striped awnings, wooden crates, and a simple door; no decorative columns or elaborate steps.
